verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus David.   Exsultate, justi, in Domino ;  rectos decet collaudatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַנְּנ֣וּ צַ֭דִּיקִים בַּֽיהֹוָ֑ה לַ֝יְשָׁרִ֗ים נָאוָ֥ה תְהִלָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David. Rejoice in the Lord, O ye just: praise becometh the upright.
verses.finnish_biblia: Riemuitkaat, te vanhurskaat, Herrassa; vakain pitää häntä kauniisti kiittämän.
verses.king_james: Rejoice in the Lord, O ye righteous: for praise is comely for the upright.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Domino in cithara ;  in psalterio decem chordarum psallite illi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה בְּכִנּ֑וֹר בְּנֵ֥בֶל עָ֝שׂ֗וֹר זַמְּרוּ־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give praise to the Lord on the harp; sing to him with the psaltery, the instrument of ten strings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät Herraa kanteleilla, veisatkaat hänelle kiitosta kymmenkielisellä psaltarilla.
verses.king_james: Praise the Lord with harp: sing unto him with the psaltery and an instrument of ten strings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate ei canticum novum ;  bene psallite ei in vociferatione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִֽׁירוּ־ל֭וֹ שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ הֵיטִ֥יבוּ נַ֝גֵּ֗ן בִּתְרוּעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing to him a new canticle, sing well unto him with a loud noise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisatkaat hänelle uusi virsi: veisatkaat jalosti kielten leikissä, helisemisellä.
verses.king_james: Sing unto him a new song; play skilfully with a loud noise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia rectum est verbum Domini,  et omnia opera ejus in fide.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יָשָׁ֥ר דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְכׇל־מַ֝עֲשֵׂ֗הוּ בֶּאֱמוּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the word of the Lord is right, and all his works are done with faithfulness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herran sana on totinen, ja mitä hän lupaa, sen hän vahvana pitää.
verses.king_james: For the word of the Lord is right; and all his works are done in truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diligit misericordiam et judicium ;  misericordia Domini plena est terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֭הֵב צְדָקָ֣ה וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט חֶ֥סֶד יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה מָלְאָ֥ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He loveth mercy and judgment; the earth is full of the mercy of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakastaa vanhurskautta ja tuomiota; maa on täynnänsä Herran laupiutta.
verses.king_james: He loveth righteousness and judgment: the earth is full of the goodness of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verbo Domini cæli firmati sunt,  et spiritu oris ejus omnis virtus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּדְבַ֣ר יְ֭הֹוָה שָׁמַ֣יִם נַעֲשׂ֑וּ וּבְר֥וּחַ פִּ֝֗יו כׇּל־צְבָאָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: By the word of the Lord the heavens were established; and all the power of them by the spirit of his mouth:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran sanalla ovat taivaat tehdyt, ja kaikki heidän joukkonsa hänen suunsa hengellä.
verses.king_james: By the word of the Lord were the heavens made; and all the host of them by the breath of his mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregans sicut in utre aquas maris ;  ponens in thesauris abyssos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּנֵ֣ס כַּ֭נֵּד מֵ֣י הַיָּ֑ם נֹתֵ֖ן בְּאוֹצָר֣וֹת תְּהוֹמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Gathering together the waters of the sea, as in a vessel; laying up the depths in storehouses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän pitää koossa veden meressä niinkuin roukkiossa, ja kätkee syvyydet.
verses.king_james: He gathereth the waters of the sea together as an heap: he layeth up the depth in storehouses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timeat Dominum omnis terra ;  ab eo autem commoveantur omnes inhabitantes orbem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִֽירְא֣וּ מֵ֭יְהֹוָה כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ מִמֶּ֥נּוּ יָ֝ג֗וּרוּ כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֥י תֵבֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let all the earth fear the Lord, and let all the inhabitants of the world be in awe of him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Peljätköön Herraa kaikki maa; häntä peljätköön kaikki maan piirin asuvaiset.
verses.king_james: Let all the earth fear the Lord: let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ipse dixit, et facta sunt ;  ipse mandavit et creata sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ה֣וּא אָמַ֣ר וַיֶּ֑הִי הֽוּא־צִ֝וָּ֗ה וַֽיַּעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he spoke and they were made: he commanded and they were created.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä koska hän sanoo, niin se tapahtuu; jos hän käskee, niin se on tehty.
verses.king_james: For he spake, and it was done; he commanded, and it stood fast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus dissipat consilia gentium ;  reprobat autem cogitationes populorum,  et reprobat consilia principum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה הֵפִ֥יר עֲצַת־גּוֹיִ֑ם הֵ֝נִ֗יא מַחְשְׁב֥וֹת עַמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord bringeth to nought the counsels of nations; and he rejecteth the devices of people, and casteth away the counsels of princes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra tekee pakanain neuvot tyhjäksi; hän saattaa kansain ajatukset turhaksi.
verses.king_james: The Lord bringeth the counsel of the heathen to nought: he maketh the devices of the people of none effect.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consilium autem Domini in æternum manet ;  cogitationes cordis ejus in generatione et generationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲצַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה לְעוֹלָ֣ם תַּעֲמֹ֑ד מַחְשְׁב֥וֹת לִ֝בּ֗וֹ לְדֹ֣ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the counsel of the Lord standeth for ever: the thoughts of his heart to all generations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herran neuvo pysyy ijankaikkisesti, hänen sydämensä ajatukset sukukunnasta sukukuntaan.
verses.king_james: The counsel of the Lord standeth for ever, the thoughts of his heart to all generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beata gens cujus est Dominus Deus ejus ;  populus quem elegit in hæreditatem sibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֣י הַ֭גּוֹי אֲשֶׁר־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑יו הָעָ֓ם ׀ בָּחַ֖ר לְנַחֲלָ֣ה לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord: the people whom he hath chosen for his inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se kansa, jonka Herra on Jumala, se kansa, jonka hän itsellensä on perinnöksi valinnut.
verses.king_james: Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord; and the people whom he hath chosen for his own inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: De cælo respexit Dominus ;  vidit omnes filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭שָּׁמַיִם הִבִּ֣יט יְהֹוָ֑ה רָ֝אָ֗ה אֶֽת־כׇּל־בְּנֵ֥י הָאָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath looked from heaven: he hath beheld all the sons of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra katsoi taivaasta alas, ja näki kaikki ihmisten lapset.
verses.king_james: The Lord looketh from heaven; he beholdeth all the sons of men.

verses.latin_vulgate: De præparato habitaculo suo  respexit super omnes qui habitant terram :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽמְּכוֹן־שִׁבְתּ֥וֹ הִשְׁגִּ֑יחַ אֶ֖ל כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: From his habitation which he hath prepared, he hath looked upon all that dwell on the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vahvalta istuimeltansa katsoi hän kaikkia, jotka maan päällä asuvat.
verses.king_james: From the place of his habitation he looketh upon all the inhabitants of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui finxit sigillatim corda eorum ;  qui intelligit omnia opera eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַיֹּצֵ֣ר יַ֣חַד לִבָּ֑ם הַ֝מֵּבִ֗ין אֶל־כׇּל־מַעֲשֵׂיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He who hath made the hearts of every one of them: who understandeth all their works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän valmistaa kaikkein heidän sydämensä: hän ymmärtää kaikki heidän työnsä.
verses.king_james: He fashioneth their hearts alike; he considereth all their works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non salvatur rex per multam virtutem,  et gigas non salvabitur in multitudine virtutis suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵֽין־הַ֭מֶּלֶךְ נוֹשָׁ֣ע בְּרׇב־חָ֑יִל גִּ֝בּ֗וֹר לֹא־יִנָּצֵ֥ל בְּרׇב־כֹּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king is not saved by a great army: nor shall the giant be saved by his own great strength.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei kuningasta auta hänen suuri väkensä, eikä sankari vapahdeta suurella voimallansa.
verses.king_james: There is no king saved by the multitude of an host: a mighty man is not delivered by much strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fallax equus ad salutem ;  in abundantia autem virtutis suæ non salvabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֣קֶר הַ֭סּוּס לִתְשׁוּעָ֑ה וּבְרֹ֥ב חֵ֝יל֗וֹ לֹ֣א יְמַלֵּֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Vain is the horse for safety: neither shall he be saved by the abundance of his strength.
verses.finnish_biblia: Orhiit ei myös auta; ja heidän suuri väkevyytensä ei pelasta.
verses.king_james: An horse is a vain thing for safety: neither shall he deliver any by his great strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce oculi Domini super metuentes eum,  et in eis qui sperant super misericordia ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה עֵ֣ין יְ֭הֹוָה אֶל־יְרֵאָ֑יו לַֽמְיַחֲלִ֥ים לְחַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold the eyes of the Lord are on them that fear him: and on them that hope in his mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, Herran silmät katsovat niitä, jotka häntä pelkäävät, jotka hänen laupiuteensa toivovat,
verses.king_james: Behold, the eye of the Lord is upon them that fear him, upon them that hope in his mercy;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut eruat a morte animas eorum,  et alat eos in fame.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהַצִּ֣יל מִמָּ֣וֶת נַפְשָׁ֑ם וּ֝לְחַיּוֹתָ֗ם בָּרָעָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: To deliver their souls from death; and feed them in famine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että hän pelastais heidän sielunsa kuolemasta, ja elättäis heitä nälän aikana.
verses.king_james: To deliver their soul from death, and to keep them alive in famine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anima nostra sustinet Dominum,  quoniam adjutor et protector noster est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַ֭פְשֵׁנוּ חִכְּתָ֣ה לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה עֶזְרֵ֖נוּ וּמָגִנֵּ֣נוּ הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our soul waiteth for the Lord: for he is our helper and protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meidän sielumme odottaa Herraa, joka on meidän apumme ja kilpemme!
verses.king_james: Our soul waiteth for the Lord: he is our help and our shield.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia in eo lætabitur cor nostrum,  et in nomine sancto ejus speravimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־ב֭וֹ יִשְׂמַ֣ח לִבֵּ֑נוּ כִּ֤י בְשֵׁ֖ם קׇדְשׁ֣וֹ בָטָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in him our heart shall rejoice: and in his holy name we have trusted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä meidän sydämemme iloitsee hänessä, ja me toivomme hänen pyhään nimeensä.
verses.king_james: For our heart shall rejoice in him, because we have trusted in his holy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat misericordia tua, Domine, super nos,  quemadmodum speravimus in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־חַסְדְּךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֣ה עָלֵ֑ינוּ כַּ֝אֲשֶׁ֗ר יִחַ֥לְנוּ לָֽךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let thy mercy, O Lord, be upon us, as we have hoped in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Olkoon sinun laupiutes, Herra, meidän päällämme, niinkuin me sinuun uskallamme!
verses.king_james: Let thy mercy, O Lord, be upon us, according as we hope in thee.
